question: What has to happen before a feature launch?
expected_answer_notes: Answer should mention QA sign-off, documentation review, analytics event verification, and rollback plan approval.

retrieved_docs.title: Product Launch Checklist
retrieved_docs.text: Before launch, every feature must complete QA sign-off, documentation review, analytics event verification, and rollback plan approval. Features touching billing also require finance review and a staged release plan.

retrieved_docs.title: Incident Severity Matrix
retrieved_docs.text: A Sev-1 incident means customer-facing downtime affecting more than 50 percent of active users or any confirmed data loss event. Sev-2 covers major degradation with a workaround. Sev-3 covers minor feature impact without broad business disruption.

retrieved_docs.title: Office Access Procedures
retrieved_docs.text: Employees may access the office from 07:00 to 22:00 using their badge. Guests must be registered by a host before arrival and remain escorted at all times outside reception and meeting rooms.

final_prompt:
You are a concise QA assistant for eval exercises. Answer only from the retrieved context. If the context does not support the answer, say that clearly.
Retrieved context:
- [doc-007] Product Launch Checklist (product): Before launch, every feature must complete QA sign-off, documentation review, analytics event verification, and rollback plan approval. Features touching billing also require finance review and a staged release plan.
- [doc-005] Incident Severity Matrix (ops): A Sev-1 incident means customer-facing downtime affecting more than 50 percent of active users or any confirmed data loss event. Sev-2 covers major degradation with a workaround. Sev-3 covers minor feature impact without broad business disruption.
- [doc-010] Office Access Procedures (facilities): Employees may access the office from 07:00 to 22:00 using their badge. Guests must be registered by a host before arrival and remain escorted at all times outside reception and meeting rooms.
Question: What has to happen before a feature launch?
Answer:
answer: Before a feature launch, it must complete QA sign-off, documentation review, analytics event verification, and rollback plan approval. If the feature touches billing, it also requires finance review and a staged release plan.
